headline: Death in custody inquests completed for only 38% of cases
context: Of 127 deaths in police custody between 2020 and 2024, inquests were completed for only 48 cases as of early 2025.

cards.big: Only 48 of 127 custodial deaths since 2020 had completed inquests
cards.sub: Families wait years for answers about how loved ones died in state care

cards.big: Criminal Procedure Code Section 334 mandates inquest for death in custody
cards.sub: Magistrates' courts face backlog with average inquest taking 2.3 years

cards.big: UN Body of Principles requires prompt investigation of all custodial deaths
cards.sub: Malaysia's compliance gap leaves 79 families without closure

cards.big: Coroner's findings attributed 34% of completed inquests to 'natural causes'
cards.sub: Independent medical review available in only 12 of 48 completed cases

cards.big: 38% completion rate means 62% of custodial deaths face no accountability
Malaysian Bar called for independent forensic review of all custodial deaths
